title: Teach For India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Teach For India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the Teach For India Ventures Solutions family as a Subject Matter Expert in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Teach For India Ventures Solutions:
Teach For India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Teach For India Ventures Solutions!
